name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services with multiple locations nationwide. Fast funding available for qualified borrowers.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating numerous physical locations across the United States. The company provides a range of short-term lending and financial services designed for consumers needing quick access to cash or other financial solutions. Their service model centers on same-day or next-day funding for qualifying applicants, positioning them as an emergency lending option for time-sensitive financial needs. The company maintains a significant retail footprint with store locators available on their website, indicating widespread geographic availability across multiple states.

ACE Cash Express offers a diverse portfolio of financial products including installment loans, title loans (collateral-based lending), check cashing services, bill payment processing, money transfers, business services, and tax services. They also provide online loan applications for consumers who prefer digital access. The company advertises installment loans and title loans as primary offerings, with additional services spanning check cashing through bill payments and tax preparation assistance. Their customer service infrastructure includes phone lines and email support specifically dedicated to online loan inquiries and general customer service requests.

The company differentiates itself through multi-channel service delivery combining physical store locations with online loan application capabilities. They maintain customer service channels specifically segmented for different inquiry types (general vs. internet operations), suggesting operational scale and service specialization. Their product range extends beyond payday loans to include collateral-based lending (title loans) and longer-term installment products, providing options across different borrowing needs and credit profiles.

ACE Cash Express operates in the high-cost lending space with products typically available only in specific states—website content confirms that loan availability varies significantly by state, with some locations indicating product unavailability due to state regulations. This suggests APRs and terms are likely high and state-dependent. The company's emergency cash positioning and small-dollar loan focus indicates this is designed for short-term needs rather than sustainable financial solutions. Their reliance on physical locations and collateral-based lending (title loans) reflects a traditional subprime lending model.
pros: Multiple service options including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, and money transfers beyond basic payday lending
Online loan application option available for consumers preferring digital access
Widespread physical store network enabling in-person service across multiple states
Same-day or next-day funding capability for qualifying applicants
Dedicated customer service channels with phone and email support
Additional financial services like bill payment, tax services, and business services
Title loan option provides alternative for consumers with vehicle collateral
cons: Loan availability is highly state-dependent with regulatory restrictions preventing service in some states
No pricing or APR information disclosed on website—typical of this industry indicating likely high rates
Emergency-cash products are designed as short-term solutions, not sustainable debt reduction
Title loan offering creates risk of vehicle repossession for borrowers unable to repay
Website navigation issues and broken location pages suggest inconsistent service reliability and company responsiveness
best_for: Consumers with same-day cash needs and no access to traditional lending or credit lines
Vehicle owners needing emergency cash who can secure a title loan in their state
Individuals requiring check cashing or money transfer services without a bank account
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is appropriate for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies with same-day funding needs, particularly those with vehicle collateral or without traditional banking access. The critical caveat is that these are high-cost, short-term lending products not designed for sustainable financial solutions—borrowers must verify product availability in their state and understand all terms before applying, as regulatory restrictions vary significantly by location.
services: Cards (specific product type not detailed on available pages)
Physical store locations with in-person service

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
